parameters.subject: We received your message - Craft Mode
parameters.text:
=Hi {{ $json.name }},

Thanks for reaching out to Craft Mode!

We've received your inquiry about {{ $json.service || 'our services' }} and will get back to you within 24 hours.

In the meantime, you can:
- Book a free consultation: https://calendly.com/craftmode/consultation
- Learn more about us: https://craftmode.co

Best regards,
The Craft Mode Team
